name: Apollo 15
left: Descent stage · ALSEP · LRV rover · flag · Fallen Astronaut sculpture
fact: First mission with the Lunar Roving Vehicle — drove 27.9 km. Scott left a small aluminium figurine, 'Fallen Astronaut', and a plaque listing all astronauts and cosmonauts who died in the space race. It is the only artwork on the Moon, left without public announcement at the time.
capability: First crewed surface mobility — extended exploration radius from hundreds of metres to tens of kilometres, the model for crewed Mars surface operations.
